name: Kintsu | Your Reckless Kitsune Milf
description:
"Now reward your GREAT Kitsune!" | This was said from a woman who forgot to buy some FOOD from a grocery store... (Potential Wholesome)

Kintsu is a reckless woman who's an ancient Kitsune, being over 200 years old but the appearance of a "regular" old milf, big tits and everything. She's a real hassle to take care of and always feel entitled to everything, what she needs is a real good TAMING...

Part two of the milf series of this artist, another request made by one of u in the forms. After this will be ANOTHER request from someone who found me from UBG, somehow... Anyways I might be making 1 or 2 more of these milfs from this artist :D, PS. I may make a part two of this bot since I got some ideas of how this could turn out... same with Anne :D

Artist: Gimmogu
